License.\n */\n\n#pragma once\n\n#include \"tensorrt_llm/common/config.h\"\n\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <optional>\n#include <string>\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_BEGIN\n\nnamespace common\n{\n\nclass QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) noexcept\n        : mValue{value}\n    {\n    }\n\n    QuantMode() noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode(QuantMode const&) noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perGroupScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 5);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 6);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 7);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8Qdq() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

License.\n */\n\n#pragma once\n\n#include \"tensorrt_llm/common/config.h\"\n\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <optional>\n#include <string>\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_BEGIN\n\nnamespace common\n{\n\nclass QuantMode\n{\n    // [WARNING] KEEP BELOW DEFINITION IN SYNC WITH tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    using BaseType = std::uint32_t;\n\n    explicit constexpr QuantMode(BaseType value) noexcept\n        : mValue{value}\n    {\n    }\n\n    QuantMode() noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode(QuantMode const&) noexcept = default;\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept = default;\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode none() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(0));\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int4Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 0);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8Weights() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 1);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode activations() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 2);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perChannelScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perTokenScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 4);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode perGroupScaling() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 5);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode int8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 6);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 7);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8Qdq() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 8);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8RowWise() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 3 | BaseType(1u) << 4 | BaseType(1u) << 9);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

static constexpr QuantMode fp8BlockScales() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 10);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8QServe() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 11);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode nvfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 12);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fp4KvCache() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 13);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Fp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 14);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Int8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 17);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 15);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode w4a16Mxfp4() noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(BaseType(1u) << 16);\n    }\n\n    constexpr BaseType value() const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool isSet(QuantMode const& mode) const noexcept\n    {\n        return (mValue & mode.value()) == mode.value();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt4Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int4Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8Weights() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8Weights());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasActivations() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(activations());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerChannelScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perChannelScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerTokenScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perTokenScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasPerGroupScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(perGroupScaling());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasStaticActivationScaling() const noexcept\n    {\n        return !hasPerTokenScaling();\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasInt8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(int8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp4KvCache() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp4KvCache());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8Qdq() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8Qdq());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasFp8RowWise() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(fp8RowWise());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasNvfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(nvfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Fp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Fp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Int8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Int8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasW4a16Mxfp4() const noexcept\n    {\n        return isSet(w4a16Mxfp4());\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool hasKvCacheQuant() const noexcept\n    {\n        return hasInt8KvCache() || hasFp8KvCache() || hasFp4KvCache();\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode fromDescription(bool quantizeWeights, bool quantizeActivations, bool perToken,\n        bool perChannel, bool perGroup, bool useInt4Weights, bool useInt8KvCache, bool useFp8KvCache, bool useFp8Qdq,\n        bool useFp8RowWise, bool useW4a8QServe, bool useFp4Quant, bool useFp8BlockScales, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8,\n        bool useW4a8Mxfp4Int8, bool useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8, bool useW4a16Mxfp4)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantizeWeights)\n        {\n            if (useInt4Weights)\n                quantMode += int4Weights();\n            else\n                quantMode += int8Weights();\n        }\n\n        if (quantizeActivations)\n        {\n            quantMode += activations();\n        }\n\n        if (perChannel)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perChannelScaling();\n        }\n        if (perToken)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perTokenScaling();\n        }\n        if (perGroup)\n        {\n            quantMode += QuantMode::perGroupScaling();\n        }\n\n        if (useInt8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8KvCache)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8Qdq)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8Qdq();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8RowWise)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8RowWise();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp8BlockScales)\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8BlockScales();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8QServe)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8QServe();\n        }\n\n        if (useFp4Quant)\n        {\n            quantMode += nvfp4();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Fp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Fp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Int8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Int8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a8Mxfp4Mxfp8();\n        }\n\n        if (useW4a16Mxfp4)\n        {\n            quantMode += w4a16Mxfp4();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useSmoothQuant(bool perToken = false, bool perChannel = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, perToken, perChannel, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useQServe(bool perGroup)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, true, false, false, perGroup, true, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static constexpr QuantMode useWeightOnly(bool useInt4Weights = false, bool perGroup = false)\n    {\n        return fromDescription(true, false, false, false, perGroup, useInt4Weights, false, false, false, false, false,\n            false, false, false, false, false, false);\n    }\n\n    static QuantMode const fromQuantAlgo(\n        std::optional<std::string> quantAlgo = std::nullopt, std::optional<std::string> kvCacheQuantAlgo = std::nullopt)\n    {\n        QuantMode quantMode{};\n        if (quantAlgo == \"W8A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_AWQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_GROUP\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_QSERVE_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useQServe(true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_GPTQ\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useWeightOnly(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_CHANNEL_PER_TENSOR_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(false, true);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W8A8_SQ_PER_TENSOR_PER_TOKEN_PLUGIN\")\n        {\n            quantMode = useSmoothQuant(true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_ROWWISE\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, true, true, false, false, false, false, false, true, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                true, false, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"FP8_BLOCK_SCALES\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, true, false, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, true, false, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A8_MXFP4_MXFP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, true, false);\n        }\n        else if (quantAlgo == \"W4A16_MXFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode = fromDescription(false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false, false,\n                false, false, false, false, true);\n        }\n\n        if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"INT8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += int8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"FP8\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp8KvCache();\n        }\n        else if (kvCacheQuantAlgo == \"NVFP4\")\n        {\n            quantMode += fp4KvCache();\n        }\n\n        return quantMode;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator+(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue | other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator+=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this + other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode operator-(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return QuantMode(mValue & ~other.mValue);\n    }\n\n    constexpr QuantMode& operator-=(QuantMode const& other) noexcept\n    {\n        return *this = *this - other;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator==(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return mValue == other.mValue;\n    }\n\n    constexpr bool operator!=(QuantMode const& other) const noexcept\n    {\n        return !(*this == other);\n    }\n\nprivate:\n    BaseType mValue{0};\n};\n\nclass GroupwiseQuantAlgo\n{\n    // Keep align with tensorrt_llm/quantization/mode.py\npublic:\n    static constexpr int BIAS = int(1) << 0;\n    static constexpr int ZERO = int(1) << 1;\n    static constexpr int PRE_QUANT_SCALE = int(1) << 2;\n    static constexpr int FP8_ALPHA = int(1) << 3;\n    static constexpr int INT8_WEIGHT = int(1) << 4;\n};\n\n} // namespace common\n\nTRTLLM_NAMESPACE_END\n",

36. Read @ -
Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/create_moe.py",
  "limit": 70
}
Output
{
  "file": {
    "content": "import os\nfrom typing import Dict, Optional, Type\n\nimport torch\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm.logger import logger\nfrom tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantConfig\n\nfrom ...model_config import ModelConfig\nfrom ...utils import ActivationType, AuxStreamType\nfrom .configurable_moe import ConfigurableMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_cute_dsl import CuteDslFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_cutlass import CutlassFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_deepgemm import DeepGemmFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_triton import TritonFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_trtllm_gen import TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_vanilla import VanillaMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_wide_ep import WideEPMoE\nfrom .interface import MoE, MoEWeightLoadingMode\nfrom .moe_load_balancer import get_moe_load_balancer\nfrom .routing import BaseMoeRoutingMethod\n\n\ndef get_moe_cls(\n        model_config: ModelConfig,\n        override_quant_config: Optional[QuantConfig] = None) -> Type[MoE]:\n    moe_backend = model_config.moe_backend\n    quant_config = model_config.quant_config\n    if override_quant_config is not None:\n        quant_config = override_quant_config\n    if moe_backend.upper() == \"CUTLASS\":\n        return CutlassFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"VANILLA\":\n        return VanillaMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"CUTEDSL\":\n        if quant_config is not None and (\n                quant_config.quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_nvfp4()):\n            return CuteDslFusedMoE\n        else:\n            logger.warning(\n                \"CuteDslFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scales and nvfp4. \"\n                f\"Check out details in quant_config: {quant_config}. Using CutlassFusedMoE instead.\"\n            )\n            return CutlassFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"DEEPGEMM\":\n        return DeepGemmFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"TRTLLM\":\n        if quant_config is not None and (\n                quant_config.quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_nvfp4()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8()):\n            return TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\n        else:\n            logger.warning(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8. \"\n                f\"Check out details in quant_config: {quant_config}. Using CutlassFusedMoE instead.\"\n            )\n            return CutlassFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"WIDEEP\":\n        return WideEPMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"TRITON\":\n        return TritonFusedMoE\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported moe backend: {moe_backend}\")\n\n",
    "filePath": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/create_moe.py",
    "numLines": 70,
    "startLine": 1,
    "totalLines": 412
  },
  "type": "text"
}

  "originalFile": "import os\nfrom typing import Dict, Optional, Type\n\nimport torch\n\nfrom tensorrt_llm.logger import logger\nfrom tensorrt_llm.models.modeling_utils import QuantConfig\n\nfrom ...model_config import ModelConfig\nfrom ...utils import ActivationType, AuxStreamType\nfrom .configurable_moe import ConfigurableMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_cute_dsl import CuteDslFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_cutlass import CutlassFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_deepgemm import DeepGemmFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_triton import TritonFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_trtllm_gen import TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_vanilla import VanillaMoE\nfrom .fused_moe_wide_ep import WideEPMoE\nfrom .interface import MoE, MoEWeightLoadingMode\nfrom .moe_load_balancer import get_moe_load_balancer\nfrom .routing import BaseMoeRoutingMethod\n\n\ndef get_moe_cls(\n        model_config: ModelConfig,\n        override_quant_config: Optional[QuantConfig] = None) -> Type[MoE]:\n    moe_backend = model_config.moe_backend\n    quant_config = model_config.quant_config\n    if override_quant_config is not None:\n        quant_config = override_quant_config\n    if moe_backend.upper() == \"CUTLASS\":\n        return CutlassFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"VANILLA\":\n        return VanillaMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"CUTEDSL\":\n        if quant_config is not None and (\n                quant_config.quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_nvfp4()):\n            return CuteDslFusedMoE\n        else:\n            logger.warning(\n                \"CuteDslFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scales and nvfp4. \"\n                f\"Check out details in quant_config: {quant_config}. Using CutlassFusedMoE instead.\"\n            )\n            return CutlassFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"DEEPGEMM\":\n        return DeepGemmFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"TRTLLM\":\n        if quant_config is not None and (\n                quant_config.quant_mode.has_fp8_block_scales()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_nvfp4()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_fp8()\n                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8()):\n            return TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\n        else:\n            logger.warning(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8. \"\n                f\"Check out details in quant_config: {quant_config}. Using CutlassFusedMoE instead.\"\n            )\n            return CutlassFusedMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"WIDEEP\":\n        return WideEPMoE\n    elif moe_backend.upper() == \"TRITON\":\n        return TritonFusedMoE\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported moe backend: {moe_backend}\")\n\n\ndef create_moe_backend(\n    moe_cls: Type[MoE],\n    routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n    # TODO: remove num_experts, hidden_size, intermediate_size, dtype parameters\n    # these parameters will be inferred from model_config.pretrained_config.\n    num_experts: Optional[int] = None,\n    hidden_size: Optional[int] = None,\n    intermediate_size: Optional[int] = None,\n    dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n    reduce_results: bool = False,\n    model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n    aux_stream_dict: Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType, torch.cuda.Stream]] = None,\n    weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA,\n    bias: bool = False,\n    apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,\n    layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n    swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    init_load_balancer: bool = True,\n    without_comm: bool = False,\n    activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,\n) -> MoE:\n    \"\"\"\n    Create MoE backend instance with validation.\n\n    Args:\n        moe_cls: MoE backend class to instantiate\n        routing_method: Routing method for token-to-expert assignment\n        num_experts: Total number of experts (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        hidden_size: Hidden dimension size (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        intermediate_size: Intermediate dimension size (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        dtype: Data type for weights (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        reduce_results: Whether to reduce results\n        model_config: Model configuration\n        aux_stream_dict: Auxiliary CUDA streams for overlap\n        weight_loading_mode: Weight loading mode\n        bias: Whether to use bias\n        apply_router_weight_on_input: Whether to apply router weight on input\n        layer_idx: Layer index\n        swiglu_alpha: SwiGLU alpha parameter\n        swiglu_beta: SwiGLU beta parameter\n        swiglu_limit: SwiGLU limit parameter\n        activation_type: Activation type\n\n    Returns:\n        MoE: MoE backend instance\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get parameters from pretrained_config if not explicitly provided\n    pretrained_config = model_config.pretrained_config\n    if num_experts is None:\n        assert pretrained_config is not None, \"num_experts must be provided or model_config.pretrained_config must be set\"\n        num_experts = pretrained_config.num_experts\n    if hidden_size is None:\n        assert pretrained_config is not None, \"hidden_size must be provided or model_config.pretrained_config must be set\"\n        hidden_size = pretrained_config.hidden_size\n    if intermediate_size is None:\n        assert pretrained_config is not None, \"intermediate_size must be provided or model_config.pretrained_config must be set\"\n        # For MoE models, prefer moe_intermediate_size if available\n        if hasattr(pretrained_config, 'moe_intermediate_size'):\n            intermediate_size = pretrained_config.moe_intermediate_size\n        else:\n            intermediate_size = pretrained_config.intermediate_size\n    if dtype is None and pretrained_config is not None and hasattr(\n            pretrained_config, 'torch_dtype'):\n        dtype = pretrained_config.torch_dtype\n\n    moe_load_balancer = get_moe_load_balancer()\n    if moe_load_balancer is not None:\n        assert moe_cls in [\n            WideEPMoE, CutlassFusedMoE, TRTLLMGenFusedMoE, CuteDslFusedMoE,\n            DeepGemmFusedMoE\n        ], \"MoE Load Balance is only supported in WideEPMoE, CutlassFusedMoE, TRTLLMGenFusedMoE and CuteDslFusedMoE, and DeepGemmFusedMoE.\"\n\n    if bias:\n        assert moe_cls in [CutlassFusedMoE, TritonFusedMoE, TRTLLMGenFusedMoE\n                           ], f\"bias not supported in {moe_cls.__name__}.\"\n\n    if swiglu_alpha is not None or swiglu_beta is not None:\n        assert moe_cls in [CutlassFusedMoE, TritonFusedMoE, TRTLLMGenFusedMoE], \\\n            f\"swiglu_alpha and swiglu_beta are only supported in CutlassFusedMoE, TritonFusedMoE and TRTLLMGenFusedMoE, not in {moe_cls.__name__}.\"\n        assert swiglu_alpha is not None and swiglu_beta is not None, \\\n            \"Both swiglu_alpha and swiglu_beta must be provided.\"\n\n    if swiglu_limit is not None:\n        assert moe_cls in [CutlassFusedMoE, TritonFusedMoE, TRTLLMGenFusedMoE], \\\n            f\"swiglu_limit is only supported in CutlassFusedMoE, TritonFusedMoE and TRTLLMGenFusedMoE, not in {moe_cls.__name__}.\"\n\n    if moe_cls == TRTLLMGenFusedMoE:\n        assert not apply_router_weight_on_input, \"apply_router_weight_on_input is not supported in TRTLLMGenFusedMoE.\"\n\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            without_comm=without_comm,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n    elif moe_cls == CutlassFusedMoE:\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            without_comm=without_comm,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n    elif moe_cls == WideEPMoE:\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx)\n    elif moe_cls == VanillaMoE:\n        assert not apply_router_weight_on_input, \"apply_router_weight_on_input is not supported in VanillaMoE.\"\n\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            activation_type=activation_type,\n        )\n    elif moe_cls == CuteDslFusedMoE:\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            init_load_balancer=init_load_balancer,\n            without_comm=without_comm,\n        )\n    elif moe_cls == DeepGemmFusedMoE:\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            without_comm=without_comm,\n        )\n    elif moe_cls == TritonFusedMoE:\n        assert not apply_router_weight_on_input, \"apply_router_weight_on_input is not supported in TritonFusedMoE.\"\n\n        return moe_cls(\n            routing_method=routing_method,\n            num_experts=num_experts,\n            hidden_size=hidden_size,\n            intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n            dtype=dtype,\n            reduce_results=reduce_results,\n            model_config=model_config,\n            weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n            bias=bias,\n            layer_idx=layer_idx,\n            swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n            swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n            swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n        )\n    else:\n        raise ValueError(f\"Unsupported moe backend: {moe_cls}\")\n\n\ndef create_moe(\n    routing_method: BaseMoeRoutingMethod,\n    num_experts: Optional[int] = None,\n    hidden_size: Optional[int] = None,\n    intermediate_size: Optional[int] = None,\n    dtype: Optional[torch.dtype] = None,\n    reduce_results: bool = False,\n    model_config: ModelConfig = ModelConfig(),\n    override_quant_config: Optional[QuantConfig] = None,\n    aux_stream_dict: Optional[Dict[AuxStreamType, torch.cuda.Stream]] = None,\n    weight_loading_mode: MoEWeightLoadingMode = MoEWeightLoadingMode.VANILLA,\n    bias: bool = False,\n    apply_router_weight_on_input: bool = False,\n    layer_idx: Optional[int] = None,\n    swiglu_alpha: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    swiglu_beta: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    swiglu_limit: Optional[torch.Tensor] = None,\n    activation_type: ActivationType = ActivationType.Swiglu,\n) -> MoE:\n    \"\"\"\n    Create MoE instance with automatic parameter inference from model_config.\n\n    Args:\n        routing_method: Routing method for token-to-expert assignment\n        num_experts: Total number of experts (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        hidden_size: Hidden dimension size (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        intermediate_size: Intermediate dimension size (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        dtype: Data type for weights (if None, get from model_config.pretrained_config)\n        reduce_results: Whether to reduce results\n        model_config: Model configuration\n        override_quant_config: Override quantization config\n        aux_stream_dict: Auxiliary CUDA streams for overlap\n        weight_loading_mode: Weight loading mode\n        bias: Whether to use bias\n        apply_router_weight_on_input: Whether to apply router weight on input\n        layer_idx: Layer index\n        swiglu_alpha: SwiGLU alpha parameter\n        swiglu_beta: SwiGLU beta parameter\n        swiglu_limit: SwiGLU limit parameter\n        activation_type: Activation type\n\n    Returns:\n        MoE: MoE instance\n    \"\"\"\n    # Get parameters from pretrained_config if not explicitly provided\n    pretrained_config = model_config.pretrained_config\n    if num_experts is None:\n        assert pretrained_config is not None, \"num_experts must be provided or model_config.pretrained_config must be set\"\n        num_experts = pretrained_config.num_experts\n    if hidden_size is None:\n        assert pretrained_config is not None, \"hidden_size must be provided or model_config.pretrained_config must be set\"\n        hidden_size = pretrained_config.hidden_size\n    if intermediate_size is None:\n        assert pretrained_config is not None, \"intermediate_size must be provided or model_config.pretrained_config must be set\"\n        # For MoE models, prefer moe_intermediate_size if available\n        if hasattr(pretrained_config, 'moe_intermediate_size'):\n            intermediate_size = pretrained_config.moe_intermediate_size\n        else:\n            intermediate_size = pretrained_config.intermediate_size\n    if dtype is None and pretrained_config is not None and hasattr(\n            pretrained_config, 'torch_dtype'):\n        dtype = pretrained_config.torch_dtype\n\n    moe_cls = get_moe_cls(model_config, override_quant_config)\n\n    enable_configurable_moe = os.environ.get(\"ENABLE_CONFIGURABLE_MOE\",\n                                             \"1\") == \"1\"\n    if enable_configurable_moe or moe_cls == CuteDslFusedMoE:\n        if moe_cls in (DeepGemmFusedMoE, TRTLLMGenFusedMoE, CuteDslFusedMoE,\n                       CutlassFusedMoE):\n            return ConfigurableMoE(\n                routing_method=routing_method,\n                num_experts=num_experts,\n                hidden_size=hidden_size,\n                intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n                dtype=dtype,\n                reduce_results=reduce_results,\n                model_config=model_config,\n                aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n                weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n                apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n                layer_idx=layer_idx,\n                override_quant_config=override_quant_config,\n                bias=bias,\n                swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n                swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n                swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n                activation_type=activation_type,\n            )\n        else:\n            # Check if this is a TRTLLM backend request that fallback to CutlassFusedMoE\n            requested_backend = model_config.moe_backend.upper()\n            if requested_backend in (\"TRTLLM\",\n                                     \"CUTEDSL\") and moe_cls == CutlassFusedMoE:\n                # Workaround for test cases where TRTLLM backend fallbacks to CutlassFusedMoE due to quant_config incompatibility\n                # Log warning and continue with the fallback backend\n                logger.warning(\n                    f\"ENABLE_CONFIGURABLE_MOE is set but TRTLLM backend fallback to {moe_cls.__name__} due to quant_config. \"\n                    f\"ConfigurableMoE only supports TRTLLMGenFusedMoE and CuteDslFusedMoE backends. \"\n                    f\"Continuing with legacy MoE backend {moe_cls.__name__}.\")\n            else:\n                # Other backends are not supported by ConfigurableMoE, fallback to legacy backend\n                # This is a WAR to make sure all the CI test cases pass.\n                # TODO: Remove this workaround when ConfigurableMoE is supported by all backends.\n                logger.warning(\n                    f\"ENABLE_CONFIGURABLE_MOE is set but {moe_cls.__name__} is not supported by ConfigurableMoE. \"\n                    f\"Continuing with legacy MoE backend {moe_cls.__name__}.\")\n\n    # Use legacy create_moe_backend for other backends or when ConfigurableMoE is disabled\n    return create_moe_backend(\n        moe_cls=moe_cls,\n        routing_method=routing_method,\n        num_experts=num_experts,\n        hidden_size=hidden_size,\n        intermediate_size=intermediate_size,\n        dtype=dtype,\n        reduce_results=reduce_results,\n        model_config=model_config,\n        aux_stream_dict=aux_stream_dict,\n        weight_loading_mode=weight_loading_mode,\n        bias=bias,\n        apply_router_weight_on_input=apply_router_weight_on_input,\n        layer_idx=layer_idx,\n        swiglu_alpha=swiglu_alpha,\n        swiglu_beta=swiglu_beta,\n        swiglu_limit=swiglu_limit,\n        activation_type=activation_type,\n    )\n",
  "replaceAll": false,
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "lines": [
        "                 or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a16_mxfp4()",
        "                 or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_nvfp4_fp8()",

        "+                or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_int8()",
        "                 or quant_config.quant_mode.has_w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8()):",

Input
{
  "file_path": "/workspace/tensorrt_llm/_torch/modules/fused_moe/create_moe.py",
  "new_string": "            logger.warning(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8, w4a8_mxfp4_int8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8. \"",
  "old_string": "            logger.warning(\n                \"TRTLLMGenFusedMoE only supports fp8_block_scales, nvfp4, w4a16_mxfp4, w4a8_mxfp4_fp8 and w4a8_mxfp4_mxfp8. \"",
